plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize Azure OpenAI js Playground Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agent and Apps" option within the "New Project" dropdown list in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension of Visual Studio Code.

Click on the "Teams Agent with Data" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" selection dialog in Visual Studio Code (Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension).
Click the "Custom" dropdown option in the "Select an option to load your data" menu within the "Teams Agent with Data" dialog of Visual Studio Code, to decide how to load your data.
Click the "Default folder" input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to specify the directory path for the project.
